title: Why Biaheza Sold His Real Estate...
key_points:
This guy, BiEHeza, who we're good
friends with, just posted a video
selling his property in Texas. [music]
And he wanted to get out of the game
entirely. And he broke down all of his
returns. I think he bought in 2021. So,
right as the market started to go up, he
bought, and then the market went up even
further. Like,
he did everything on paper correctly,
but didn't account for the time it would
take, for the risk with repairs, for
higher property taxes, higher insurance. And that's the thing with Texas, is that
like the values keep going up, and then
all of a sudden they hit you with these
assessments every year
